text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day off, Smart Falcon brings me to a pastry
shop in a department store.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ What's the first thing that comes to mind
when you think "cute"? Desserts, of course!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I can't become a top Umadol without extensive
research, sooo...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Without further ado, let's start investiga... Hm?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Is that who I think it is?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Hello. This appears to be what is known as a
"coincidence."

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I thought that was you, Bourbon! Are you here to
buy a dessert?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. Sweet snacks are an efficient way to
replenish energy.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This area has a high concentration of specialty
stores, so I've come to examine the quality items
available here.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
In other words, research! That's why I'm here
too! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Since we're both here, why don't we eat together?
What do you say, Bourbon? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Request approved. Collaboration on the same
objective will further increase results.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
For the first operation, I propose we consume all
forty-two items on sale at this store.
choice_data_list: Th-think of how that'll affect your weight!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Buuut! If we're going to complete our research
successfully, we've gotta put our bodies on the
line!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So, please, Trainer! Say it's okay!
choice_data_list: Sorry, but there's no way I can allow that!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Laaaame! Come ooon, Traineeeer!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I am also disappointed. However, considering
the potential effects of rapid weight gain, it is a
rational decision.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If I may propose an alternative, why don't we
gather visual data through "window research"?
choice_data_list: I don't see a problem with that.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I see... Appearances sell a dessert just as much as
taste!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Bourbon! You must be really motivated to
find a work-around just like that!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna see this research on cuteness
through to the very end! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not leaving until my Umasta is full of dessert
appearance reviews!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, the two head toward the pastry shop
with determined faces.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thank you! Isn't that great, Bourbon? ☆

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...All digestive organs have transitioned from
standby to active mode.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Let us begin our research immediately. The final
goal is to conquer every store on this floor!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Your determination is so strong, I can feel
it in the air!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Buuut... my drive for "cuteness" is not about to be
beat! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna eat until my Umasta is totally full of
reviews!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, the two "research" so many desserts I
lose count.
